CVE-2019-17566.title: Apache Batik is vulnerable to server-side request forgery, caused ...
CVE-2019-17566.summary: Apache Batik is vulnerable to server-side request forgery, caused by improper input validation by the "xlink:href" attributes. By using a specially-crafted argument, an attacker could exploit this vulnerability to cause the underlying server to make arbitrary GET requests.

CVE-2020-11987.title: Apache Batik 1.13 is vulnerable to server-side request forgery, c ...
CVE-2020-11987.summary: Apache Batik 1.13 is vulnerable to server-side request forgery, caused by improper input validation by the NodePickerPanel. By using a specially-crafted argument, an attacker could exploit this vulnerability to cause the underlying server to make arbitrary GET requests.

CVE-2022-38398.title: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability in Batik of Apac ...
CVE-2022-38398.summary: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability in Batik of Apache XML Graphics allows an attacker to load a url thru the jar protocol. This issue affects Apache XML Graphics Batik 1.14.

CVE-2022-38648.title: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability in Batik of Apac ...
CVE-2022-38648.summary: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability in Batik of Apache XML Graphics allows an attacker to fetch external resources. This issue affects Apache XML Graphics Batik 1.14.

CVE-2022-40146.title: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability in Batik of Apac ...
CVE-2022-40146.summary: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability in Batik of Apache XML Graphics allows an attacker to access files using a Jar url. This issue affects Apache XML Graphics Batik 1.14.

CVE-2022-41704.title: A vulnerability in Batik of Apache XML Graphics allows an attacke ...
CVE-2022-41704.summary: A vulnerability in Batik of Apache XML Graphics allows an attacker to run untrusted Java code from an SVG. This issue affects Apache XML Graphics prior to 1.16. It is recommended to update to version 1.16.

CVE-2022-42890.title: A vulnerability in Batik of Apache XML Graphics allows an attacke ...
CVE-2022-42890.summary: A vulnerability in Batik of Apache XML Graphics allows an attacker to run Java code from untrusted SVG via JavaScript. This issue affects Apache XML Graphics prior to 1.16. Users are recommended to upgrade to version 1.16.

CVE-2022-44729.title: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability in Apache Softwa ...
CVE-2022-44729.summary:
Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability in Apache Software Foundation Apache XML Graphics Batik.This issue affects Apache XML Graphics Batik: 1.16.

On version 1.16, a malicious SVG could trigger loading external resources by default, causing resource consumption or in some cases even information disclosure. Users are recommended to upgrade to version 1.17 or later.

CVE-2022-44730.title: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability in Apache Softwa ...
CVE-2022-44730.summary:
Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability in Apache Software Foundation Apache XML Graphics Batik.This issue affects Apache XML Graphics Batik: 1.16.

A malicious SVG can probe user profile / data and send it directly as parameter to a URL.
